purpose: Defines the shared multi-authority official source inventory shape used before selecting timetable adapters and linking Calendar Readiness records.

field_definitions.country_id: Stable country identifier shared with country, timetable, and Calendar Readiness datasets.
field_definitions.authority_id: Stable racing authority identifier within the country scope.
field_definitions.authority_name_en: English authority name for review and display.
field_definitions.authority_name_local: Local-language authority name when applicable; use null when no local variant is needed.
field_definitions.racecourse_scope: Racecourse coverage scope for the source candidate.
field_definitions.official_source_id: Stable source identifier for the authority source candidate.
field_definitions.official_source_url: Official or authority-owned source URL used for confirmation.
field_definitions.source_kind: Kind of source capability being inventoried.
field_definitions.last_checked_date: Date the source candidate was last checked, using YYYY-MM-DD, or null when not checked yet.
field_definitions.capability_rank: Shared global timetable capability rank from C through A+.
field_definitions.adapter_candidate_status: Adapter-selection readiness after source review, without implementing the adapter.
field_definitions.notes: Public-safe reviewer notes; no internal strategy, raw source bodies, participant data, betting data, results, payouts, predictions, tips, or complete racecards.

explicit_exclusions: no raw source body or html storage
no horses runners jockeys trainers weights or gates
no odds betting recommendations results payouts predictions or tips
no credentials restricted access details or bypass instructions
no internal strategy budget monetization or private workflow notes
